body.title: Implement worker dispatch routing in PROC_WORKER_FOREMAN habit
body.result: Worker routing: cc_queue add auto-defaults worker by tags/size/paths; launch_next_worker dispatches to adopt_next_ticket (igor, in-process via pe_chain) or konsole-spawn (claude/missing); seed narrative updated. 16 new tests pass. Validation is T-worker-dispatch-validation.
body.description: Worker field exists in queue.json (values: claude|igor, defaults to claude) but PROC_WORKER_FOREMAN doesn't read it to dispatch correctly. Needed: (1) automatic defaults in cc_queue.py add: HIGH-inertia OR size=XL -> worker=claude, else worker=igor; (2) PROC_WORKER_FOREMAN routing logic: read worker field, call adopt_next_ticket if igor (in-process pe_chain), call launch_next_worker if claude (konsole daemon spawn); (3) update seed_worker_foreman.py narrative to document the dispatch. Scope: cc_queue.py defaults, worker_foreman.py routing switch, seed script. Does not touch ENGRAM_CODE_*; depends on T-engram-trigger-cell-name-mismatch to unlock the igor path. Does not touch brainstem/ or models.py.
